title: I loved this portable DIY 35mm film scanner with built-in light, and it could save me a lot of money — but it’s not as simple as it sounds
summary: As such, the Valoi easy35 v2 immediately caught my attention, with its promises to make the process of scanning film negatives at home into something, well, easy. However, the scanning process itself was unbelievably fluid, easy and even fun.
caption: output/2026-07-20/i-loved-this-portable-diy-35mm-film-scanner-with-built-in-light-and-it.txt
